emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The Hardiman Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 68/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL redirect
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 8 inline scripts
 HIGH
--------------------
- No schema markup
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Small tap targets on mobile
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No analytics


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.detail: Visitors reaching HTTP are not redirected to HTTPS, risking security warnings.
issues.label: No SSL redirect
issues.check: Type http://[domain] - does it automatically go to https://?
issues.siteHint: Google flags non-HTTPS sites as 'Not Secure' in Chrome.

issues.label: 8 inline scripts
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Missing structured data helps Google display rich snippets in search results.
issues.label: No schema markup
issues.check: Search for your business on Google - do you see star ratings, hours, or FAQ entries?
issues.siteHint: Competitors with rich snippets get 3x more clicks.

issues.label: Small tap targets on mobile
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Without analytics, you can't track traffic sources, popular pages, or conversion rates.
issues.label: No analytics
issues.check: Install the Tag Assistant extension and check if GA or similar is detected.
issues.siteHint: You can't improve what you don't measure.
